issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in pre-referral and post-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were generating double tasks across multiple workflows including pre-referral and post-referral. The issue was traced to a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and resolved the underlying association/filter problem.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or delete the duplicate tasks as needed.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked as Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs continued to receive post-referral workflow check-in tasks for deals that had been marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow filters were not correctly excluding these deal stages from triggering ongoing tasks. A tweak to the workflow filters was made to resolve the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually unenroll any Closed Lost or Transferred deals from the post-referral workflow if they are still generating tasks from the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering TC tasks when deal stage flipped back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, then back to a prior stage, and then to Offer Accepted again, the workflow tasks for TCs did not re-trigger on the second Offer Accepted update. The root cause was that 'deal stage = offer accepted' was missing from the workflow re-enrollment criteria. The re-enrollment criteria was updated to include this trigger.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were flipped back to Offer Accepted a second time during the impact window to ensure TC tasks are generated.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer's name after LO change
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails sent to the agent continued to display the previous LO's information rather than the updated LO. The affected deal showed Paul instead of Julie Yocum in outgoing emails. The issue was resolved by Luis as a product-level fix.
issues.workaround: Manually send the agent introduction email with the correct LO information for any deals where the LO was changed during the impact window.

issues.title: MRC deals marked Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering enrollment into the TC workflow, meaning TCs received no tasks for these deals. HubSpot support was consulted and a fix was applied. MRC deals typically have no loan officer assigned, which was initially suspected but not confirmed as the root cause.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted during the impact window into the TC workflow so closing tasks are generated.
